summary: Re-grepped all four dome layers as ISS-1132 requested. Current state: ai_manifest=10, overview=10, claim_index strict=1, predictions.html banner=12, wins.html grid=10 (drifted +1 from 9 since ISS-1132 filing 2026-04-18 without any aggregate moving). EXP-396 patches SEC-4.6 TLDR (three-layer→four-layer, 10/9/1→10/10/1/12) and row 2 of the six-concession table to capture the predictions.html banner as a fourth disagreement and to quote overview.json registry_semantics as kernel-of-truth credit. Also proposes a follow-up minor tooling issue for a daily poller hook (the testability ask in original ISS-1132). Two surgical text edits in data/sections.json part4; old_text strings verified present.
